note: Both our features require editing loaders.py (unavoidable overlap - path_transform must touch all loader classes including FileSystemLoader; fallback_searchpath only touches FileSystemLoader). In get_source, please put your fallback-search logic as a distinct block (e.g. after the primary searchpath loop, before the final raise) - I'll only add one line at the top of get_source to transform  before use, so our blocks won't overlap textually. I'll leave FileSystemLoader mostly to you structurally and just append my small transform hook. Let me know if that ordering works, then I'll proceed with DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader entirely on my own (no overlap there).
